ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the item type */,
  "current_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current library where the item is located */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection the item belongs to */,
  "call_number" TEXT /* Call number of the item */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the resource or additional information */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the item */,
  "date_due" TEXT /* Due date for the item if checked out */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the item */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the item */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the item */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "number_of_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies of the item in the collection */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the item */,
  "physical_description" TEXT /* Physical description (e.g., pages, dimensions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_current_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES item_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the library */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the library */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the library */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the library */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the library's website */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users the library can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library where the collection is located */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bindings" (
  "binding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binding event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sent for binding */,
  "binding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the binding process */,
  "binding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the binding process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the binding */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for binding or maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bindings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

Reference to the collection the item belongs to

Number of copies of the item in the collection
